A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent computed category counts and the average rating using a truncated business set retrieved with a hard LIMIT 1000 (query var_function-call-8386243319813155086) and then aggregated in Python (var_function-call-11143604476873651033), causing incomplete coverage that led it to select "Shopping" instead of the correct "Restaurant."
